judge.reason: The primary purpose of bnx2fc_post_io_req is to initialize and post an I/O request to the hardware, involving extensive business logic (DMA direction setup, buffer descriptor list building, task context initialization, session checks, timeout setting, queue management, doorbell ring). The three kref_put calls are only for cleanup on error paths and do not constitute the main purpose. Refcount management is incidental, not the function's raison d'être.
